title: quaqua bayeriana
side_effects: Quaqua bayeriana can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Additionally, consuming large amounts of the plant can cause symptoms like dizziness, headaches, and fatigue in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Quaqua bayeriana can lead to more serious health issues, including kidney damage and heart problems. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
